general.condition: Product unused, with original tags and packaging
general.process: Initiate return via 'My Orders' section → Select item → Choose 'Return' → Courier pickup in 3-5 business days
general.refund_timeline: Refund processed within 5-7 business days after pickup. Amount credited to original payment method.
exceptions: Underwear, socks, and personal care items cannot be returned
Electronics must be returned within 10 days only
Products with tampered serial numbers are not eligible

footwear.notes: Shoes must be tried on carpet. Worn outside shoes not accepted.

clothing.notes: All tags must be attached. Washed or altered clothes not accepted.

electronics.notes: Must include all accessories and original box. Defective items tested before approval.

accessories.notes: Wallets, bags, and sunglasses must be unused with tags.

sports.notes: Used fitness equipment not eligible. Unopened items only.

groceries.notes: Perishable items cannot be returned. Damaged items reported within 24hrs.

health.notes: Personal care and health items cannot be returned due to hygiene reasons.
